```
Patient?_has:Condition:patient:code=http://snomed.info/sct|399068003,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|C61&_has:Procedure:patient:code=http://snomed.info/sct|75330005

Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|399068003,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|C61&_revinclude=Procedure:subject&_include=Condition:subject

Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|75330005&reason-code=http://snomed.info/sct|399068003,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|C61&_include=Procedure:subject

Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|75330005&reason-code=http://snomed.info/sct|258232002&_include=Procedure:subject

ImagingStudy?modality=http://dicom.nema.org/resources/ontology/DCM|NM&reason=http://snomed.info/sct|399068003,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|C61&_include=ImagingStudy:subject
```

### Query Breakdown

| Query | Purpose | Key Parameters |
|-------|---------|----------------|
| `Patient?_has:...` | Single query returning Patient resources matching **both** criteria | `_has` double constraint on Condition + Procedure |
| `Condition?..._revinclude` | Start from prostate cancer diagnoses, pull related Procedures | `_revinclude=Procedure:subject` |
| `Procedure?...reason-code=C61` | Bone scans explicitly linked to prostate cancer as reason | SNOMED `75330005` + ICD-10 `C61` |
| `Procedure?...reason-code=staging` | Bone scans with cancer staging as the documented reason | SNOMED `258232002` (staging) |
| `ImagingStudy?modality=NM` | Nuclear medicine imaging (bone scans are NM modality) with prostate cancer reason | DICOM `NM` modality |

### Key Codes Used
- **Prostate Cancer:** SNOMED `399068003` · ICD-10-CM `C61`
- **Bone Scan (Procedure):** SNOMED `75330005`
- **Cancer Staging (Reason):** SNOMED `258232002`
- **Nuclear Medicine (Modality):** DICOM `NM`

## FHIR Queries: Prostate Cancer Patients with Bone Scan for Staging

```
Condition?code=http://snomed.info/sct|399068003,http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10-cm|C61&_include=Condition:subject

Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|41747003&reason-code=http://snomed.info/sct|258243000&_include=Procedure:subject

ImagingStudy?modality=http://dicom.nema.org/resources/ontology/DCM|NM&reason-code=http://snomed.info/sct|258243000&_include=ImagingStudy:subject

Patient?_has:Condition:patient:code=http://snomed.info/sct|399068003&_has:Procedure:patient:code=http://snomed.info/sct|41747003&_has:Procedure:patient:reason-code=http://snomed.info/sct|258243000
```

### Query Breakdown

| Query | Resource | Purpose | Key Codes |
|-------|----------|---------|-----------|
| **1** | `Condition` | Find prostate cancer diagnoses | SNOMED `399068003` (Malignant tumor of prostate) / ICD-10-CM `C61` |
| **2** | `Procedure` | Bone scan procedures flagged for staging | SNOMED `41747003` (Bone scan), reason `258243000` (Staging) |
| **3** | `ImagingStudy` | Nuclear medicine imaging (bone scan modality) | DICOM `NM` (Nuclear Medicine), staging reason |
| **4** | `Patient` | **Combined** — patients satisfying **both** criteria via `_has` chaining | Prostate cancer + bone scan + staging reason |

### Notes
- **Query 4** is the most targeted — returns only `Patient` resources where **both** conditions are true simultaneously.
- `ImagingStudy` (Query 3) captures bone scans stored as imaging studies rather than discrete procedures.
- Staging reason code `258243000` (SNOMED *Staging*) can be supplemented with `405978007` (*Cancer staging*) if your system uses it.
- Add `&clinical-status=active` to Query 1 to restrict to active diagnoses only.
